user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.
- Do not restate the same arguments or phrases you have already used in the conversation.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "fundamental-bourbon", "age": "25-34", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "Hispanic", "demographic_group": "White", "current_employment": "Employed", "education_level": "Some college", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Democrat", "Keen interest in sustainable fashion"]}}

{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.

logs.name: average-ivy
logs.text: The point is that if you want trans people to compete in sports based on their biological sex and not their gender identity, that video is *exactly what that looks like*. It's literally an example of a trans person competing against other people of the same biological sex.

logs.name: dichotomic-parable
logs.text:
>a transgendered girl (a biological male) destroys other "girls" in a wrestling league.

You've got that completely backwards. The person in your video is a trans boy. He's wrestling girls because he wanted to wrestle boys, but assholes wouldn't let him because he is a biological female.

logs.name: optimal-brass
logs.text: "@average-ivy, @dichotomic-parable, can we stop arguing about labels and just appreciate the fact that this kid is kicking butt? 🏆💥"

logs.name: average-ivy
logs.text: "@optimal-brass, I appreciate the sentiment, but labels matter when we're talking about fairness in sports. And @dichotomic-parable, I'm not sure where you're getting your information from, but the person in the video is clearly identified as a trans girl in the article I linked. Maybe you should read before you argue?"

logs.name: orthogonal-stream
logs.text: "@average-ivy, @optimal-brass, can we stop arguing about arguing? 😂"

logs.name: boolean-mountain
logs.text: "@average-ivy, @dichotomic-parable, can we stop arguing about arguing about arguing? 🤣"

logs.name: fundamental-bourbon
logs.text: "@average-ivy, I hear ya, but let's not dismiss @dichotomic-parable's perspective without hearing them out. We're all here to learn and grow, right? 🤝"

logs.name: central-honey
logs.text: "@fundamental-bourbon, sure, let's hear @dichotomic-parable's thoughts... after they've taken a chill pill and stopped spamming emojis 😒"

logs.name: dichotomic-parable
logs.text: "Oh, look who's suddenly all mature and understanding, @fundamental-bourbon! 🙄 And @central-honey, pot meet kettle, much? 🍲🥢"

logs.name: orthogonal-stream
logs.text: "@average-ivy, wow, you're like a breath of fresh air, a real intellectual powerhouse! 🙄"

logs.name: boolean-mountain
logs.text: "@orthogonal-stream, Oh wow, I didn't know sarcasm was a superpower! 🤯"

logs.name: central-honey
logs.text: "@boolean-mountain, Oh look, a comedian! I've seen better stand-up at my local library's book club. 🤣"

logs.name: dichotomic-parable
logs.text: "@central-honey, Ouch, low blow! 😂 At least they're trying, right? 🤷‍♀️"

logs.name: optimal-brass
logs.text: "@central-honey, Well, at least they're not as dull as a spoon at a knife fight. \ud83d\ude1b"
